subTopicTitle: Poems of the Decade (Anthology) — Look We Have Coming to Dover! — Daljit Nagra

items.prompt: What are the primary themes explored in 'Look We Have Coming to Dover!' by Daljit Nagra?
keyPoints: Hope and fear of the immigrant experience
